name: Confetti Stars
visual_summary: Confetti Stars is a interactive button component that, when clicked, displays a star-shaped firework effect on screen. It is suitable for adding a celebratory or congratulatory tone to an application. Developers would use this component when they need to add a visually appealing effect to a button.
